data.body:
LANDING PROGRESS (Gerrit): P2 = change 769, P1 = change 770 (stacked). Both pushed.
- P2 (4b59): inbound link direction + inverse-aware dedup. LLM-Review +1 earlier. First CI FAILED on MODULE-SIZE gate (inbound_differ.py 857 > ceiling 806 after my additions). FIXED by extracting the direction logic (resolve_inbound_link/deps_as_set/INVERSE_RELATION) into a new sibling module link_direction.py (59 LOC), loaded via inbound_differ's lazy-load bootstrap — this ALSO completes the single-source-of-truth unification (shared by inbound add + outbound removal paths, both pinned by test_link_direction_absolute.py). inbound_differ.py now 805 LOC. Re-verified: 1287 unit tests pass; live 54-ticket check still 0 emits; lint/format/typecheck clean.
- P1 (1f3d): get_comments --paginate + multi-page parse (_parse_paginated_comments). RED->GREEN (RED with the real JSONDecodeError 'Extra data'). Mutation check: removing --paginate -> argv test RED. LIVE fix-verification: fixed get_comments('REB-155') returns 5000 (was 50); _diff_comments emits 0 re-posts of already-synced bodies (only 7 genuinely-unsynced comments remain, 0 normalization false-negatives) -> runaway duplication STOPPED.
Both changes claimed (4b59, 1f3d) via --force (epic 58b0 plan-review LLM was slow). Commits carry rebar-ticket trailer + DCO + Change-Id (769=Icc31..., 770=I7330...).
Stack surgery note: extraction was folded into P2 via reset+amend+git-am (P1 disjoint files). Backup branch: backup-jira-sync-stack.
NEXT: monitor CI votes on 769/770; submit when LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; then observability (P3: promote RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP + count comment_errors) as a 3rd stacked change; Jira comment cleanup AFTER P1 deploys.
